text:
Using a Computer Simulation to Model the Field

Scientists use computers to reproduce the behavior of a system so that they can see the effects on the system if there is a change to any part of it. We will use an interactive to reproduce the behavior of a system with a magnet and a coil, like in the speaker. We can use the interactive to explore how the magnetic field responds to changes in other parts of the system.

WIth your group

31. Follow your teacher’s directions for exploring the magnetic field with the computer interactive.
